prompt: Go ahead and apply to the jobs that are waiting in my tracker

assertions.text: References reading preferences.json for batch_size and timeout settings
References reading site-difficulty.json before attempting jobs
Shows the correct Supabase query filtering by status = needs_apply
Mentions loading candidate-profile.json (not hardcoded personal data)
Shows summary.md output in apply-runs/ folder with table format
Shows terminal summary with applied/failed/skipped counts
